ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "start_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., long-term, short-term) */,
  "row_col" TEXT /* Row and column location of the experimental plot */,
  "crop" TEXT /* Crop type (e.g., WW for wheat) */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Year range of the experiment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type at the location */,
  "topography" TEXT /* Topography of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_data" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil data record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the soil data belongs to */,
  "soc_top" REAL /* Soil organic carbon (SOC) level in the top layer */,
  "soc_bottom" REAL /* Soil organic carbon (SOC) level in the bottom layer */,
  "delta_soc_top" REAL /* Change in soil organic carbon (SOC) level in the top layer */,
  "delta_soc_bottom" REAL /* Change in soil organic carbon (SOC) level in the bottom layer */,
  "ini_soc_top" REAL /* Initial soil organic carbon (SOC) level in the top layer */,
  "ini_soc_bottom" REAL /* Initial soil organic carbon (SOC) level in the bottom layer */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date when the soil data was sampled */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the soil sample */,
  "texture" TEXT /* Texture of the soil sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nitrogen_data" (
  "nitrogen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nitrogen data record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the nitrogen data belongs to */,
  "n_min" REAL /* Nitrogen mineralization level */,
  "n_leach" REAL /* Nitrogen leaching level */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date when the nitrogen data was sampled */,
  "n_fixation" REAL /* Nitrogen fixation level */,
  "n_denitrification" REAL /* Nitrogen denitrification level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nitrogen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nitrogen_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each carbon emission data record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the carbon emission data belongs to */,
  "co2_emission" REAL /* Carbon dioxide emission level */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date when the carbon emission data was sampled */,
  "co2_concentration" REAL /* Carbon dioxide concentration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_emissions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop yield data record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the crop yield data belongs to */,
  "yield" REAL /* Crop yield level */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the crop yield was harvested */,
  "moisture_content" REAL /* Moisture content of the crop */,
  "protein_content" REAL /* Protein content of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the environmental data belongs to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the sampling period */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation during the sampling period */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the sampling period */,
  "sampling_date" TEXT /* Date when the environmental data was sampled */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation during the sampling period */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the sampling period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farming_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farming practice */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the farming practice belongs to */,
  "practice_name" TEXT /* Name of the farming practice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the farming practice */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the farming practice */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the farming practice */,
  "tillage_type" TEXT /* Type of tillage used */,
  "fertilizer_type" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used */,
  "pesticide_type" TEXT /* Type of pesticide used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farming_practices_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "IP_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the dataset belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the collaboration is associated with */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
